root_policy.baseline: No standalone Biomes O' Plenty root block is registered in the audited 1.21.1 baseline.
root_policy.instruction: Do not invent root IDs. If the installed BOP version contains root blocks, list them in the compatibility matrix and add no recipe until a direct, non-magical vanilla/FD/IE analogue is verified.
